pam.note: Broader than TTTV — recognises G-start PAMs. Enables targeting sites inaccessible to all TTTV-restricted enzymes. Validated on 256-PAM dsDNA array.

seed.note: PAM-proximal positions critical. Per-position mismatch tolerance not systematically quantified.

kinetics.note: 49.6% avg editing in HEK293T (vs 65.5% AsCas12a, 25.6% LbCas12a controls). Trans-cleavage active but kinetic constants not published.

temperature.low_temp_performance: Not characterized. Subtype VIII variants (RbrCas12a) active at 25°C.

divalent_cation: Mn2+ preferred (2.5 mM MnSO4 for trans-cleavage)
snv_discrimination: Demonstrated on KRAS G12C (10 copies, 0.1% VAF with RPA)

references.data: Discovery via AIL-Scan (ESM LLM), 256-PAM array, editing efficiency, cryo-EM, KRAS G12C detection, Mn2+ preference
